utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. The final property solution includes all six sections with details. Now check each for full specification: 1) property: includes selected property, details, and price—yes. 2) financing: includes lender contact, mortgage amount, down payment, interest rate, monthly payment, amortization, benefits—yes. 3) legal_services: provider, contact, cost, service, timeline—yes. 4) moving_services: provider, cost, service, timeline—yes. 5) setup_services: includes inspection (provider, cost, service), utilities (service, cost, includes), home_insurance (cost, transition)—yes. 6) total_budget: property price, down payment, closing costs, additional services, total cash required, monthly mortgage payment, buyers’ savings—yes. All items are present and fully specified.
